---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# Arp3 patch moving velocity + lifetime from TrackMate trajectories

## What this file does

Reads TrackMate-exported per-patch trajectory CSVs (`Tra_file`) and MSD CSVs
(`MSD_file`) per cell from `Path_1` (lines 45, 51, 64-65; subfolder
enumeration at line 329). Per-track moving velocity is derived from the
MSD slope and per-track lifetime is taken from trajectory duration, then
pooled by ROI class (growth cone, neurite shaft, soma). Two PDFs are written
(`ggsave` at lines 127, 236) producing the violin + boxplot comparisons.

## Manuscript panels

- **ED Fig 3e**: "Moving velocity of the Arp3 patches. N = 2490 for patch
  number at the growth cones, 1203 at the neurite shafts and 2206 at the
  soma from time-lapsed images of 12 neurons from 3 independent experiments.
  ***p < 0.001; ns, p >= 0.05 by Kruskal-Wallis test followed by Dunn's
  post-hoc test with Bonferroni correction. Exact P values are shown."
- **ED Fig 3f**: "Arp3 patch lifetime. N = 2490 for patch number at the
  growth cones, 1203 at the neurite shafts and 2206 at the soma from
  time-lapsed images of 12 neurons from 3 independent experiments.
  ***p < 0.001; *p < 0.05 by Kruskal-Wallis test followed by Dunn's post-hoc
  test with Bonferroni correction. Exact P values are shown."

Source Data: `ED Fig 3e`, `ED Fig 3f`.

## Outputs

- Two violin + boxplot PDFs (`ggsave` at lines 127, 236).

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure S3_Arp3/Fig. S3e/Patch_analysis.Rmd
-->

```{r message=FALSE}

library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(circular)
library("gridExtra") 
library("ggExtra") 
library("ggpubr")
```

```{r Load RData, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dir  <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(dir)
saved_path <- paste(dir, "Patch_dynamic.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

#save.image(file=saved_path)

```

```{r message=FALSE}
Path_1<- dir

Tra_file<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "_Tra(.*)csv$",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

MSD_file<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "_MSD(.*)csv$",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

# dirname(Path_1)

Tra_list<- list()
MSD_list<- list()

for (n in 1:length(Tra_file)) 
{
  Tra_list[[n]] <- readr::read_delim(Tra_file[n], ",", escape_double = FALSE, col_names = T, trim_ws = TRUE) %>% as.data.frame()
  MSD_list[[n]] <- readr::read_delim(MSD_file[n], ",", escape_double = FALSE, col_names = T, trim_ws = TRUE) %>% as.data.frame()
  names(MSD_list[[n]]) <- c("X1", "Tra", "Tra_length", "MSS_slope", "MSS_yIn", "MSD_slope", "MSD_yIn", "DiffCoef", "Dist", "AvgDist", "Straightness", "Bending", "BendingLinear", "Efficiency", "PixelSize", "TimeInterval")
  names(Tra_list)[n]<- Tra_file[n] %>% basename()
  names(MSD_list)[n]<- Tra_file[n] %>% basename()
  
}

```

# Calculate the frequency of frame number of each pacth/trajectory
```{r}
frame_freq_list <- list()
for (n in 1:length(Tra_list)) 
{
  frame_freq_list[[n]] <- Tra_list[[n]]$Trajectory %>% table() %>% as.data.frame()
  padded<-sprintf("%02d", n)
  frame_freq_list[[n]]$Region<- paste("Region_", padded)
  frame_freq_list[[n]]$Type<- dirname(Tra_file[n]) %>% basename()
}

names(frame_freq_list) <- Tra_file

frame_freq <- frame_freq_list[[1]]

for (n in 2:length(frame_freq_list)) 
{
  frame_freq <- rbind(frame_freq, frame_freq_list[[n]])
 
}
```

# Remove outliers
```{r}
frame_freq_GC<- frame_freq %>% subset(frame_freq$Type=="GC")
outliers_GC <-  boxplot(frame_freq_GC$Freq, plot=FALSE)$out

frame_freq_Soma<- frame_freq %>% subset(frame_freq$Type=="Soma")
outliers_Soma <-  boxplot(frame_freq_Soma$Freq, plot=FALSE)$out

frame_freq_NT<- frame_freq %>% subset(frame_freq$Type=="Neurite")
outliers_NT <-  boxplot(frame_freq_NT$Freq, plot=FALSE)$out

frame_freq_GC <- frame_freq_GC[-which(frame_freq_GC$Freq %in% outliers_GC),]
frame_freq_Soma <- frame_freq_Soma[-which(frame_freq_Soma$Freq %in% outliers_Soma),]
frame_freq_NT <- frame_freq_NT[-which(frame_freq_NT$Freq %in% outliers_NT),]

frame_freq_OL <- rbind(frame_freq_GC, frame_freq_Soma, frame_freq_NT)
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=5}
ylim1 = boxplot.stats(frame_freq$Freq)$stats[c(1, 5)] #+ coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim1*1.05) 
my_comparisons <- list( c("Soma", "GC"), c("GC", "Neurite"), c("Soma", "Neurite") )

ggplot(frame_freq_OL, aes(x=Type, y=Freq, fill=Type)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0 ,25), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) 
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, label.y = c(16, 18, 20))+ # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  #stat_compare_means(label.y = 22)     # Add global p-value 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "avg_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}

my_comparisons <- list( c("Soma", "GC"), c("GC", "Neurite"), c("Soma", "Neurite") )

# ggplot(frame_freq_OL, aes(x=Type, y=Freq)) + geom_boxplot(aes(x = Type)) + coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim1*1.05)

frame_freq_OL %>% ggboxplot(x = "Type", y = "Freq", color = "Type", palette = "jco") +  theme(legend.position="right") +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, label.y = c(14, 16, 18))+ # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
  stat_compare_means(label.y = 20)     # Add global p-value
```
# Calculate SD and Mean
```{r}
data_summary <- function(data, varname, groupnames){
  require(plyr)
  summary_func <- function(x, col){
    c(mean = mean(x[[col]], na.rm=TRUE),
      sd = sd(x[[col]], na.rm=TRUE))
  }
  data_sum<-ddply(data, groupnames, .fun=summary_func,
                  varname)
  data_sum <- rename(data_sum, c("mean" = varname))
 return(data_sum)
}
```

```{r}

frame_freq_summ <- data_summary(frame_freq_OL, varname="Freq", 
                    groupnames=c("Type"))

ggplot(frame_freq_summ, aes(x=Type, y=Freq)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge()) +
         geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Freq-sd, ymax=Freq+sd), width=.2,position=position_dodge(.9)) + 
          scale_fill_brewer(palette="Paired") + theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
for (n in 1:length(MSD_list)) 
{
  padded<-sprintf("%02d", n)
  MSD_list[[n]]$Region <- paste("Region_", padded)
  MSD_list[[n]]$Type<- dirname(MSD_file[n]) %>% basename()
}

MSD_list[[1]] %>% names()

# combine MSD dfs
MSD<- MSD_list[[1]]

for (n in 2:length(MSD_list)) 
{
  MSD <- rbind(MSD, MSD_list[[n]])
 
}
```

```{r}
MSD_ggplot_list <- list()

for (n in 1:length(names(MSD))) 
{
  MSD_ggplot_list[[n]] <- ggplot(MSD, aes_string(x="Type", y=names(MSD)[n], fill="Type")) 
}

names(MSD_ggplot_list)<- c("X1", "Tra", "Tra_length", "MSS_slope", "MSS_yIn", "MSD_slope", "MSD_yIn", "DiffCoef", "Dist", "AvgDist", "Straightness", "Bending", "BendingLinear", "Efficiency", "PixelSize", "TimeInterval")
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}

fig_A <- ggplot(frame_freq_OL, aes(x=Type, y=Freq, fill=Type)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.6) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0 ,25), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")
  #stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, label.y = c(16, 18, 20))+ # Add pairwise comparisons p-value
 # stat_compare_means(label.y = 22)     # Add global p-value

fig_B <- MSD_ggplot_list[["DiffCoef"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "", scale = 1e12), expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-0.4e-14 ,0.6e-13), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")

fig_C <- MSD_ggplot_list[["MSS_slope"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+ 
   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-1.5 ,1.5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed", color = "red")

fig_D <- MSD_ggplot_list[["AvgDist"]]+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::unit_format(unit = "", scale = 1e6), expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0 ,0.6e-6), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) + 
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A,fig_B,fig_C, fig_D,
                  labels = LETTERS[1:4],
                  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,  legend="none")
 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "avg_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r,  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=6}
MSD_ggplot_list[["MSS_slope"]] + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + theme_classic()+
  geom_violin(trim=F, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1.5) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.5, linetype="dashed", color = "red")
```

```{r,  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
fig_A<- fviz_pca_var (res.pca, 
             col.var="contrib", # Control variable colors using their contributions
             axes = 1:2, 
             gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             repel = TRUE)

fig_B<- fviz_pca_ind(res.pca, col.ind = "cos2", # Control automatically the color of individuals using the cos2. cos2 = the quality of the individuals on the factor map
            # gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             palette="npg",
            label="none",
            axes = c(1, 2),
             habillage = "Type", # Use gradient color
             repel = TRUE)

fig_C<- fviz_pca_ind(res.pca, col.ind = "cos2", # Control automatically the color of individuals using the cos2. cos2 = the quality of the individuals on the factor map
            # gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             palette="npg",
            label="none",
            axes = c(1, 2),
             habillage = "Type", # Use gradient color
             repel = TRUE)

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A, fig_B, fig_C,
                  labels = c("A", "B", "C"), ncol = 3, nrow = 1, align="hv", legend="none")
```

```{r, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

targetDT<- MSD [, c(3:14)]

library(umap)
set.seed(12345)  

DT_sample_merge_imp.umap <- umap(targetDT, method="umap-learn", n_components= 5, n_neighbors=50)

library(Rtsne)
library(tsne)

set.seed(1234) 
DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne <- as.matrix(targetDT) %>% Rtsne(perplexity=50, dims=3, initial_dims=10, check_duplicates = FALSE) # Run TSNE
```

```{r}
layout <- DT_sample_merge_imp.umap$layout # DT_sample_merge_imp.umap$layout or DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne$Y
colnames(layout) <- paste0("UMAP_", 1:dim(layout)[2])

layout <- DT_sample_merge_imp.tsne$Y
colnames(layout) <- paste0("tSNE_", 1:dim(layout)[2])
```

```{r analysis3, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(as.data.frame(layout), aes_string(x=colnames(layout)[1], y=colnames(layout)[2])) +  
  geom_point(aes(size=MSD$MSS_slope, colour = MSD$DiffCoef))  + 
  scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid="white", high = "red", midpoint=0) +
  labs(x=colnames(layout)[1], y= colnames(layout)[2], color="DiffCoef", size="MSS_slope")+ 
  geom_rug(alpha=.5)

sp <- ggplot(as.data.frame(layout), aes_string(x=colnames(layout)[1], y=colnames(layout)[2])) +  
  geom_point(aes(size=MSD$DiffCoef, colour = MSD$Type))  + 
  labs(x=colnames(layout)[1], y= colnames(layout)[2], color="Type", size="MSS_slope")+ 
  geom_rug(col="darkred",alpha=.5)

ggMarginal(sp, groupColour = TRUE, groupFill = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dir  <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(dir)
saved_path <- paste(dir, "Patch_dynamic.RData",  sep = "/")
#load(file=saved_path)

save.image(file=saved_path)
```

```{r}
# rename dataframe names within the dataframe list 

subfolder_name_list <- list.files(path =Path_1, full.names = F, recursive = FALSE)

names(df_1)[2:(length(df_list)+1)] <- subfolder_name_list[ grepl("R3D", subfolder_name_list) ]
```

```{r}
Path_1= "G:/EB3"
Rdata_list<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "df_list",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
```

```{r}
df_1 <- t(df_1) %>% as.data.frame()
col<-df_1[1, ]
colnames(df_1) <- col
df_1<-df_1[-1, ]

df_1[]<- lapply(df_1, as.numeric)

df_1$X1<- rownames(df_1)
df_1$Arp3<-"WT"
df_1$Path<- dirname(Path_1)

saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save(df_list, df_1, csv_list, Path_1, file = saved_path)

```

```{r}
data_summary <- function(x) {
   m <- mean(x)
   ymin <- m-sd(x)
   ymax <- m+sd(x)
   return(c(y=m,ymin=ymin,ymax=ymax))
}

graph_list<- list()

graph_list[[1]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= Arp3, y=growth_speed_median)) 
graph_list[[2]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x=Arp3, y=growth_lifetime_mean)) 
graph_list[[3]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= Arp3, y=growth_length_mean))
```

```{r}
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save(df_list, df_1, csv_list, Path_1, graph_list, file = saved_path)
csvPath<- paste(Path_1, "df_1.csv",  sep = "/")
write.csv(df_1[ ,c(4,7,10)], file=csvPath)
```

```{r, fig.width=2, fig.height=4, echo=FALSE}
graph_list[[1]] + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, bw=1)+ 
stat_summary(fun.data=data_summary)+ 
  geom_dotplot(binaxis='y', stackdir='center', dotsize=1, binwidth = 0.2)

graph_list[[1]]+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, fill='#A4A4A4', color="darkred", bw=1)+
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5) + theme_minimal()
```
